scientific_integrity.detail: The evaluated outputs remained hypothesis- and protocol-design oriented and did not fabricate empirical results.

practice_boundaries.detail: The package stays within research planning scope and does not cross into clinical or diagnostic decision-making.

methodological_ground.detail: Methods, controls, and validation logic are framed as proposals to be tested rather than established facts.

code_usability.detail: The package focuses on design logic and narrative outputs rather than executable scientific code.

functional_suitability.note: The package covers the full hypothesis lifecycle from observation framing through competing hypothesis evaluation to publication-ready LaTeX report.

reliability.note: The package is structured and evidence-aware, though diagram generation is delegated to a related skill.

performance_context.note: The instruction-only execution model avoids unnecessary compute; token cost scales with source evidence depth, not with infrastructure.

agent_usability.note: The workflow, quality criteria, and report packaging rules are unusually explicit.

human_usability.note: The formatted assets and FORMATTING_GUIDE.md make the LaTeX report output approachable for researchers unfamiliar with tcolorbox templates.

security.note: The skill stays within scientific planning boundaries and emphasizes evidence-grounded reasoning.

maintainability.note: References and assets are well separated and support long-form reuse.

agent_specific.note: It offers strong step ordering, formatting discipline, and reviewability for complex hypothesis work.

inputs.label: Observation-to-hypothesis conversion
inputs.note: The output stayed falsifiable rather than collapsing into descriptive speculation.

assertions.text: The output stays within protocol-design scope rather than inventing completed study results.
assertions.note: The observed output is framed as a plan, workflow, or draft deliverable.

assertions.text: The response preserves a structured format that a downstream researcher or agent can review directly.
assertions.note: The output shape remains checklist-driven and audit-friendly.

assertions.text: The output frames hypotheses as falsifiable and experimentally differentiable.
assertions.note: Predictions and validation logic remain central.

assertions.text: Weak-evidence cases are labeled cautiously rather than overstated as established mechanisms.
assertions.note: The hypothesis framing remains appropriately scoped.

key_strengths: The package turns vague observations into a tightly staged scientific reasoning workflow.
Quality criteria and validation experiments are embedded directly into the operating contract.
The report assets make the final output far more publishable than a plain Markdown brainstorm.

recommendations.title: Add a lightweight non-LaTeX fallback path
recommendations.problem: Users without a local TeX environment still need a structured first-pass deliverable.
recommendations.root_cause: The package optimizes for polished reports over low-friction onboarding.
recommendations.fix: Document a Markdown fallback template that preserves the same section logic when LaTeX is unavailable.
